text:
In the first image, I feel a mix of curiosity and slight discomfort. The energy of the room is lively, full of conversation and movement. I'm standing close to others, almost too close, and the hum of chatter reminds me of how connected yet isolated one can feel in a crowd. There's an underlying anticipation in the air.

In the second image, I feel absorbed and contemplative. The display about research and development invites me to reflect on humanity's relationship with knowledge, technology, and progress. The environment feels intentional and intellectually charged, sparking a sense of wonder and a drive to understand the world more deeply.
